_meta.description: Curated real-attribution quote library for quote_card posts. Public-domain and widely-circulated quotes only — no invented attributions. Used by quote_card._llm_quote as the primary source; LLM-invented quotes are a last-resort fallback only.
_meta.license: Public domain (pre-1924) + Creative Commons / fair-use excerpts. Curator: instagram-ai-agent project, 2026.

discipline: No man is free who is not master of himself.
effort: Motivation gets you going, discipline keeps you going.

quotes.quote: No man is free who is not master of himself.
Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
You have power over your mind — not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.
Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
It is not the man who has too little, but the man who craves more, that is poor.
He who is brave is free.
The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
Circumstances do not make the man; they merely reveal him to himself.
First say to yourself what you would be; and then do what you have to do.
It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
What we do in life echoes in eternity.
A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
The body achieves what the mind believes.
Strength does not come from winning. Your struggles develop your strengths.
The only bad workout is the one that didn't happen.
A year from now you'll wish you had started today.
Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
Pain is temporary. Quitting lasts forever.
The difference between try and triumph is a little umph.
Strong people don't put others down. They lift them up.
Don't limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.
You don't have to be extreme, just consistent.
Discipline equals freedom.
The hardest lifts are the ones you never put in.
Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
Motivation gets you going, discipline keeps you going.
Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
First forget inspiration. Habit is more dependable.
Change your habits, change your life.
Small habits make a big difference.
You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
Every action you take is a vote for the person you wish to become.
Suffer the pain of discipline or suffer the pain of regret.
Don't wish it were easier. Wish you were better.
Your life does not get better by chance. It gets better by change.
Work harder on yourself than you do on your job.
In the midst of chaos, there is also opportunity.
He who knows others is wise. He who knows himself is enlightened.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
A man is great not because he hasn't failed; a man is great because failure hasn't stopped him.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
What you think, you become.
The future depends on what you do today.
Be the change you wish to see in the world.
The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
Don't count the days. Make the days count.
I hated every minute of training, but I said, 'Don't quit. Suffer now and live the rest of your life as a champion.'
Champions aren't made in gyms. Champions are made from something they have deep inside them — a desire, a dream, a vision.
Float like a butterfly, sting like a bee.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
The two most important days in your life are the day you are born and the day you find out why.
The expert in anything was once a beginner.
A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.
Comparison is the thief of joy.
Nothing in the world is worth having or worth doing unless it means effort, pain, difficulty.
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
When you want to succeed as bad as you want to breathe, then you'll be successful.
Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.
The only way out is through.
Do something every day that scares you.
No one can make you feel inferior without your consent.
Good habits are worth being fanatical about.
If you are going through hell, keep going.
Courage is what it takes to stand up and speak. Courage is also what it takes to sit down and listen.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
The harder I work, the luckier I get.
Whether you think you will or think you won't, either way you are right.
Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
Hell, there are no rules here — we're trying to accomplish something.
Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
The man who does not read has no advantage over the man who cannot read.
Either write something worth reading or do something worth writing.
Lost time is never found again.
An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
Well done is better than well said.
By failing to prepare, you are preparing to fail.
A journey of a thousand miles must begin with a single step.
When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration. The rest of us just get up and go to work.
Most of the things worth doing in the world had been declared impossible before they were done.
Rivers know this: there is no hurry. We shall get there some day.
A hero is someone who has given his or her life to something bigger than oneself.
Follow your bliss and the universe will open doors where there were only walls.
People do not decide to become extraordinary. They decide to accomplish extraordinary things.
What you do every day matters more than what you do once in a while.
